title: Component Catalog
description: Validates `.specify/design-system/components.yaml`, the operator-curated component catalog. Each entry declares a shared UI component that the Vectis target factors into shared code at build time. The catalog follows the same operator-curated pattern as `tokens.yaml` and `assets.yaml`.

components.description: Map of component slugs to their metadata. Keys are kebab-case identifiers.

status.description: `confirmed` — the build should factor this as a shared component. `rejected` — the operator has decided this is not a real shared component; claims with this slug will not trigger `slice-catalog-drift` findings.

description.description: Human-readable note for operators and agents.
